# ANALYSIS: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER_REAL_FILLS_VALIDATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-22  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher_proposal  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER watcher (long-only) shows a 70.4% win rate and +$7,378 P&L using SPY-price proxy. However, per L50, the SPY-price proxy cannot model the initial-bounce effects on ATM options after ORB breakout. We hypothesize that when using real OPRA fills for ATM calls with an -8% premium stop and TP1=+75%, the win rate will be significantly lower than 70.4% due to the initial bounce causing premature stop-outs.

## Mechanism

For each of the N=274 ORB long-only observations (from the watcher grader), we will:
- Determine the entry bar close time (from the observation).
- Look up the ATM call OPRA chain for SPY at that time (using the strike closest to the SPY close at entry bar).
- Enter the trade at the mid-price of the ATM call at the entry bar close.
- Set a premium stop at -8% of the entry premium (i.e., exit if premium falls to 92% of entry).
- Set a profit target at +75% of the entry premium (i.e., exit if premium rises to 175% of entry).
- Exit at the first of stop, target, or time stop (15:50 ET).
We will then compute the win rate (percentage of trades that hit the target before stop) and compare to the watcher-graded 70.4%.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (per risk-rules.md position sizing).
2. **Sample bias:** Using N=274 ORB long-only observations from watcher grader (same sample used to develop ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER). Overfit risk: watcher developed on this sample; however, watcher already passed walk-forward (OOS/IS Sharpe ratio=2.916) mitigating concern. This validation is in-sample test of real-fills hypothesis.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (validation uses same sample as watcher; no OOS test performed).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (simulator_real.py invocation pending execution).
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: Severe initial bounce causing stop-outs on watcher-winning days (e.g., 5/04 could flip from win to loss).
   - Max drawdown: Potential for consecutive losses if bounce effect persists across multiple observations.
   - Blow-up scenario: Gap down at open triggering immediate stop on ATM calls (premium collapse >8% instantly).
6. **Concentration:** Unknown -- requires computation from validation results (top-5 days % of P&L not available without per-day P&L breakdown).

## Pre-merge gate

- Run simulator_real.py as specified: for each ORB long-only observation (N=274), lookup ATM call OPRA chain at entry bar close, -8% premium stop, TP1=+75%.
- Report real-fills WR and compare to watcher-graded WR=70.4%.
- Gate passes if real-fills WR is significantly lower (e.g., <60%) confirming L50 hypothesis; fails if WR is within 5% of 70.4% (requiring reevaluation).
- Must also compute concentration disclosure (top-5 days %) and include in OP-20.

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- Based on L50/L55 analogs (ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER real-fills test showed chart-stop-only needed; premium stops fired prematurely due to retest pullback). High confidence initial bounce effect will similarly impact ATM calls.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This validation does not change any existing candidate. It informs the ratification path for ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (rank 5, NEEDS-MORE-DATA). If validation confirms poor real-fills WR, we may decide against engine ratification. If WR is acceptable, we can proceed to ratify. No conflict with candidates 1-9. Complements ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER by providing real-fills evidence needed for OP-20 disclosure 4.
